title: Seagulls
content:
I see many thoughts from a window.
    Seagulls in the fashion of summer
    and leaves as they quit the year.
    Sense impressions, if they are this,
    are only images
    of what we refuse to follow.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Paul Cameron Brown delivers a powerful performance in "Seagulls"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
